creator: axfelix@gmail.com
text:
Hi,

I'm running a relatively ancient ASUS P2B with a Celeron 300A as a beater server. Just updated it from FreeBSD 9 to 10.2, and had to plug in a CD drive and a GPU + monitor to do this. I've just noticed that it won't boot anymore after removing the GPU, whereas this worked fine in 9.0. Unfortunately I don't really have a way of getting debug output at this point :)
